

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 1 - 1: An ancient...book? Scammed?
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

The nights of the 4th month were freezing. That was especially so in the Southern Lust City, nudged on the southern edge of the Sacred Lust continent.

Soft moonlight illuminated the night with its inherent beauty, and the silence of the weather was only broken by some stoneflies that chirped and night birds who Koo-cooed.

Today's night was no different from other nights of this time—it was cold, and there was a non-stop breeze.

But the cold breeze wasn't an issue to the two people, a youthful woman and a young man, currently perched on their house's roof. They had gotten used to the cold, and even though their breaths puffed, it was an everyday experience.

"Xiao Li, wake up, wake up! In just 10 minutes, you will turn eighteen," called the woman's gentle voice. But the youth, Han Li, just lazily laid on her lap without much interest.

He puffed out some cold air and looked at the sky, his head resting on his mother's thighs. Pondering life.

Eighteen years of age… that was when the others would have their 3rd Awakening, and he was sitting above his house looking at the sky…

It was pretty funny. Even sad in some sense. Since, unlike them, he couldn't even have his first Awakening, not to mention the third. After all, he didn't have a Spark.

Seeing his vacant gaze, his mother, Yue Li, felt her heart ache. She pinched his cheeks gently and asked, "What are you thinking of Xiao Li?"

Han Li turned his gaze to his mother's brownish-black eyes, her face now illuminated by the glow of the moonlight. How… beautiful.

He casually admired her for a second without a word. And then said with irritation, "I am just wondering what kind of gift my stupid mother wasted a whopping 300 Sacred coins on."

That was half of his usual monthly income, the income that they usually delegated for their rather fine lifestyle.

Yue Li shifted her gaze in shame and said with uncertainty, "It was your birthday after all..."

She just couldn't hold back. How can she let her son not have a gift on his birthday?

Han Li sighed.

He was grateful for her care, but still... They would have to eat just plain rice and live cheap for the next few days; that was their essential money. Being cheapskates for the next month seems to be the only way now. Or he would have to be lucky enough to get more commissions.

Well, whatever. It was his silly mother, and she was allowed to make mistakes. But still, he could only be ashamed that he couldn't feed her well.

"So, what is the gift? Show me," he asked, curious.

"So you do want a gift!" Yue Li exclaimed, her gloomy mood brightening.

"I never said that." Han Li said with a click of his tongue.

Yue Li smiled, ruffling his black hair, and said with a laugh, "I don't know if it will work, but it is a worthy gamble. If it worked, it would be a big win after all."

Han Li frowned at the words and asked, "Did someone scam you again, Mom?"

It wasn't even a proper gift that she bought for him? Uh…

"No, I was not scammed this time," she said, but even she herself heard the pinch of uncertainty in it, "I took it on purpose to see our luck."

That only made Han Li's face darken; he hated it when someone other than him scammed his mother. And this… stank of a scam.

Yue Li took a small, inconspicuous, ancient-looking, black book from her side and showed it to him. He looked at it and asked, "Is this the gift?"

Yue Li nodded. "The merchant who sold me this said that this book could only be read by the chosen one and that even a fish can become a dragon if they use this, and he even said a Spark-less person might be able to cultivate if they had this. But I couldn't read anything whatsoever. It was all blank. But what if you are the chosen one?"

Han Li didn't know whether to laugh or cry. "Wasn't anyone there to tell you not to buy it?"

Yue Li coughed gently. "The Merchant gave it to me covertly since it would be more expensive if more people wanted it. We don't want an auction, right?"

Han Li leaned towards his mother's face. He asked, annoyed, "Do you still remember the Merchant's face?"

"I do! Of course, I do! He is the one who comes whenever the Awakening ceremonies occur. I had seen him many times in the city."

Han Li gently planted a kiss on her forehead and said, "How dare he scam my mom? We will let him know what trouble is."

"You haven't even looked at it, though..." Yue Li said with frustration. "What if it works?"

"Well, if you insist," Han Li took the book from her hands and looked at its cover. It seemed ancient, and the cover was rough to the touch, like a genuinely luxurious product—an impressive scammer.

He flipped to the first page, and his heart immediately skipped a beat: Demon Transformation Sutra. It was written there in bold writing.

"Mom, you said you can't see anything here at all? Can't you see this too?"

He showed her the page, but she only saw a blank yellowed paper, no marks, no letters, nothing. She shook her head. But then, both of their eyes brightened... Jack…

Jackpot?!

"What does it say?!" Yue Li exclaimed and snuggled into his embrace to see the blank page.

Excited himself, Han Li said, his black eyes shining like a dark moon, "Let me read first. I will read it to you afterwards."

He flipped to the next page, and the words there startled him.

"You have thus become The inheritor of me, the Sacred Lust Demon."

Han Li gulped.

He had heard of that name. No, everyone and their mothers had heard of that name. It was the title of one of the Seven Sacred Demons. As said in legends, in the age when life had just started budding, seven great demons ruled the world. And Sacred Lust Demon was one of them.

Even their continent was named after him since he was the one who ruled over it in that prosperous era—Sacred Lust Continent.

Even more excited, Han Li flipped to the next page and read: "The emotion of Lust had always enamored me. From the moment I was born to this day, while I am dying, I have never reached the limits of Lust. I could never attain that apex of Cultivation. So, I relay my inheritance to the future generation; it isn't much, just the way to transform a human body into a body similar to mine.

Yet, I hope ye shall reach the apex through this, to surpass and go beyond me. And if you do, don't forget to revive me, your first Master."

Han Li gulped and then looked at the page below, and there it was, written in all its majesty, the full details of the cultivation methods, a corpus full of guidance in the general path of Cultivation, guidance from the Sacred Demon himself, written under one single title: The Demonic Lust Sutra.

The mere prospect made cold sweat matt his back. This was no joke!

He didn't continue to read all that, and for now, he only minded one thing. He had seen other Cultivation Methods in his Starlight Family's library. That made him wonder if this Sutra was actually helpful for him in any way.

All of them usually required him to have a Power Spark inside him, but unfortunately, he didn't, and even for the people who had Sparks, Cultivation Methods only came into use much later in their path—after they became stronger.

What was different in this one?

As far as he knew, a person without a power spark was trash. Can this change that?

However, even if he couldn't cultivate it, he could sell the Sutra for much more money than just 300 coins.

But a faint hope lit up inside his guts.

Maybe… just maybe…

No, it was not faint. It was screaming.

His gaze roamed the pages and soon found out what he was looking for, written under "Requirements of using the method." Clearly and concisely.

Only one person can use the main method of the Demonic Lust Sutra at a time. The Cultivator has to be at least 15 years of age and also a Male. They should not have a Power Spark of any type already inside them; if they do, they have to get rid of it. Only one of the wielders of the 7 Sacred Eyes is capable of seeing the scripture.

Sacred Eyes?

What is that?

And I have that?

Confused, Han Li couldn't believe what he saw and almost felt like he was dreaming. Blankly looking at his mother, he asked, "Who was the merchant you cheated this out of again?"

Yue Li blinked and, seeing his disbelieving expression, exclaimed, "So it is something good? So can it solve your issue with being unable to cultivate now?"

She didn't care for the possible money, and she knew how much he wanted to cultivate. If that happened, she was happy enough.

Han Li didn't answer and instead hugged her tightly; his heart was beating too loudly, and only after feeling the warmth her body emitted could he feel it was all real. This was not a dream!

He could cultivate!

A sutra existed in this world that didn't need a Spark, and it chose him. He even had some kind of unique eyes that even the great Sacred Demon found special.

Han Li looked into his mother's eyes and smiled, a smile of pure hope, a dangerous emotion.

He couldn't even speak clearly in reply due to excitement.

"So your mother is indeed not stupid." Yue Li smiled, ruffling her son's hair; her heart floated at seeing Han Li genuinely happy after a long time.

But she also felt a bit worried.

What if it didn't work in the end? She could only hope it would work.

Nevertheless, seeing him still hug her like an infant and feeling the warm tears streaming down her cold back, Yue Li smiled in his embrace.

Whatever that comes, she could only hope it was for the better.

"Don't worry, your mom is not going anywhere, the hug is too tight, and where are you kissing, not on the nape, you idiot…" she choked out with a laugh.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 2 - 2: Demonic Lust Sutra
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

The night was deep in, and the moon was now hidden behind a layer of clouds. The cold fog was cold enough to make the ones exposed to them shiver.

The snow season had yet to come, even though it was already rather freezing. But on this cold night, on top of his home's roof, Han Li sat up after explaining what he had already read in the book to his mother.

Everything about the requirements, sacred demon, and what it all meant.

And his mother sat at his side, also filled with hope and expectations. They were both born here and grew up in these cold lands; the cold was nothing new to them.

Yue Li kept looking into the blank page with her gaze, but she couldn't see anything; it was just yellowed ancient paper, whereas Han Li, who could see it, started reading the demonic, dark-covered book.

The pages were detailed, and there were in-depth explanations of what to do in order to get what. It was clear-cut and concise. Yet, it was hard for him to see the whole picture; most of it seemed unidentifiable jibberish.

Those were some chants—that was all he could tell. It was confusing; thus, he skipped such details.

Even though he was born in one of the three big clans of the city, Starlight Family, he was born without a Starlight Spark—or any Power spark for that matter—and was thus ignored by the higher-ups and never even taught the basics. There was no reason to.

And he had never gone out of his way to study the Power Path either; it was all very confusing to him except the most common of common knowledge.

So, reading the book, he couldn't understand most of what it was saying, so he didn't try to get more confused and focused on only one part.

How can he start cultivation without a Power Spark?

Only that was important.

The rest was filler, as his mother smilingly commented.

It was common knowledge that people like him, scarce as they were, born without a Spark, could never cultivate.

So how can he cultivate?

Looking further, he found exactly what he was looking for and read on with interest, everything he knew about Sparks and such streaming through his head.

'In ordinary people's Power Cultivation, being born with a Spark and going through the three Awakenings was normal.

'First, at 13 years of age.

'Second at 15 and the third Awakening at 18.

'By making the spark within them ignite with higher and higher intensity until, in the third awakening, the spark materializes outside the body.'

That was common sense.

But in this book, he could see it was different. Even before the first Awakening, there was something in its guidance: acquiring his own Power Spark.

His forehead started to sweat slightly.

Nobody had ever gone on to become a Cultivator from someone without a Spark. He was making a legend now. More than that, he could get a Spark of his own.

That was his greatest dream!

Something that had been beyond him till this very moment.

He took a deep, deep breath and steadied his beating heart. The only reason he thought it was real was his mother, who could not see the words on the page.

'First step in the path…' he read, and his heart skipped, 'was giving birth to a Lust Spark.'

His eyes shined.

'Lust spark, it sounds a bit Immoral...'

But then his eyes turned determined; it was a Spark that he was talking about. As long as he had it, his and his mother's life would be far different.

So he read on, 'To cultivate a Lust Spark in the Soul, you have to recite the sutra below while copulating with a Virgin Woman. Be mindful not to go wrong with the words even slightly as the chance would be lost.' And below it was one of the jibberish that he couldn't understand, filled with meaningless words.

But one thing was sure: this sutra was similar to those infamous Dual Cultivation Sutras he had heard about.

He couldn't help but find his heart skipping another beat.

Copulate with a Virgin woman? Where the hell was he supposed to find one?

Yue Li poked him with a finger and asked, "Xiao Li, what does it say? Can you cultivate it now?"

Han Li hesitated but said, "…It Says I have to find a wife to begin cultivating it."

Startled, Yue Li's eyes trembled. She couldn't help but suddenly become scared and silent...

And Han Li immediately saw through her emotions. He had seen her his whole life; he could read her like a book.

"What, Mom, are you sad?" he asked gently.

Yue Li didn't speak and stayed silent; what kind of bad mother would she be if she wanted to keep him sealed in her small world? She knew the world was vast and that her Xiao Li deserved more.

Even though they were as close as a mother and son could possibly be, a wife in a man's life was only natural. Her Xiao Li marrying someone was also natural.

She should be ashamed of herself for even thinking like that. Her son deserved all the happiness; she should be happy for him now. He just had to find a girl to marry, and his dream would be fulfilled.

She shook her head and asked with a smile, "Nothing, Xiao Li, so what are you going to do?"

Han Li frowned and went closer to her, then hugged her from the back and laid his chin on her shoulders, "Mom, what are you trying to hide in your little head? Tell me?"

Yue Li smiled and patted his head, "I was wondering if you would not sit alone with me on this roof again after you get married, whether you will become busy with your wife."

Han Li looked at her gentle face on the side and muttered in his heart, 'You know that's impossible.'

But he gave her a slight nod and said, "Hmm, I am really sorry, Mom. Now I will have to spend all my time with my upcoming Wife and forget about you."

Yue Li shifted away from his hug and looked at him with wide, moist, frightened eyes, "Xi...Xiao Li!"

Chuckling, Han Li took her hands, brought her back into his embrace, and then fell back on the thatched floor. Silently looking up at the sky with Yue Li atop his chest.

They stayed like that for a while before Yue Li asked with a meek tone, "So, that was a joke, Xiao Li?"

"No," he said while tightening his hug around her.

Yue Li fumed, this brat! Always making fun of her.

But whatever, she smiled slightly and rested her head on his chest, and before they knew it, both of them silently drifted off to sleep.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 3 - 3: Starlight Zone
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Starlight Family was one of the three great Families that occupied the Southern Lust City, and they occupied the western part of the city entirely for themselves, No one other than people hailing from the clan was allowed to enter this zone without permission.

The sunlight pierced the coldness of the lands and brightened its landscape, The merchants had already started to set up their wooden shops and some had already set it up.

Starlight family was a very big family, with a total of more than 500 people in its mix and more scattered outside of the city.

And that amount of people was a very good place for small trades and all these people were here for that, to trade some goods.

In essence, all these people were part of one family, but the big number and the fact that most didn't even know the others made them all quite strangers.

Of course, the traders knew each other but the buyers rarely did the traders. Walking through the morning bustle, his face pondering, Han Li silently contemplated.

He didn't actually want to get a Wife, a wife, for the first part, must be someone he loved, but he didn't have anyone like that who could become his wife.

And for the second, a wife came with responsibility and he was as of yet, incapable of bearing it.

And even if he ended up gaining the Power Spark, that won't change for quite a long time because he will have to keep the spark hidden as he cultivated or someone might covet his secrets on how he got a Spark.

Reaching a stall selling vegetables, he was pondering as he walked when suddenly someone called out, "Han Li, boy, come here."

Han Li looked to the side and Fat came into his vision, a mountain of Fat. He chuckled and moved towards him, "Uncle Li, did you get fatter?"

Pang Li looked at the cheeky brat and squinted his eyes, "Hey brat, don't try to fool me again. You have to make me that food again. I will pay, this time for sure."

"Like hell I would do that," Han Li replied with a forced chuckle, "You people worked me so hard and gave me only 20 sacred coins in the end... Give me 200 and I will cook."

"200? Brat, don't you have no shame? Even the restaurant in the inner circle only costs that much!"

Han Li cursed without even blinking, "You fat pig, you really want to scam me again, I know how much that costs."

Restaurants in the inner circle of the Starlight Zone? It cost thousands to eat once there!

Pondering for a while, Pang Li chuckled, "Take this kid, don't say your Uncle Li mistreated you," saying that, the fat man threw a small bag of coins into Han Li's hands.

Surprised, Han Li looked inside and there were about 30 sacred coins inside, shimmering with a golden glow.

"What happened Pang Li? You turned over a new leaf?" seeing the surprising act, an aunty asked from the side.

Pang Li nodded and said, his voice calm, "I have always been forthright, I was just drunk that day and couldn't pay."

In fact, he hadn't seen that the others only paid the kid that much and just came to know of it in the morning, now that he had paid, he felt his heart calm.

Han Li couldn't help but squint, "Okay, Uncle Li, if you want, I will cook. But this time, tell me the price beforehand."

"Okay," Pang Li nodded, irritated that his reputation had been stained, "I will tell you later, Let me ask the others too."

Han Li's cooking was famous among the outer area's traders and he lived off of it, most of them wanted him to cook for their special days and he got paid in return.

It was not a thriving business but it was enough for a family of two. But of course, even though others liked his cooking, to him, it was trash compared to his own mother's cooking.

He was even sure that those dark-faced people who didn't like him around would also fall for her cooking, But he would never let his mother work outside the house.

Especially not in her condition. And he didn't like some men looking at her. She was his mom, no one needed to eat her food.

Actually, he just didn't want to make her work.

Han Li nodded and walked away from Pang Li's shop, he didn't expect to get paid today but it was indeed water in a dry desert.

Now, he had a total of 250 Sacred coins left in his hands. Enough to eat well for two weeks. This was the reason he woke up early and walked all the way here, in the mornings, people tend to be more kind and he ends up getting some business.

He had to use such opportunities wisely. If he could also get two more works after Pang Li's commission, he should barely have enough to spend their life this month with their usual standards.

But he also couldn't help but narcissistically think, what if I become a great Power one day? Someone like the Sacred Lust Demon, his name renowned throughout the entirety of the world.

Wouldn't these days when I worked hard for a plate of food be remembered with fondness?

I might really have to find a wife.

Thinking of that, there was a whore house, hmm, a brothel in the Main city of Southern Lust, the part of the city that was under no one clan's control.

But he was reluctant to just do his deed on a woman and then vanish, that wasn't how he grew up. He was not a spineless man who couldn't even care for the responsibilities that came alongside his women.

Not to mention he didn't have the money. He was broke. Virgins also cost much if he remembered correctly... But he had heard some of the outer circle people boasting they had spent nights with virgins there, so it shouldn't be a truly ludicrous amount.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 4 - 4: Learning the Art of Power
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Reaching his home, Han Li opened the door using an old rusty key, every 'Starlight' receives a good home to live in as a birthright and this was the house he got. It was quite spacious, comfortable and secure.

It even had clean wooden floors.

Going in, he put the cloth packet in his hands on a table and then went to their room, his Mom was sleeping like a log underneath a comfy blanket.

'Still didn't wake up?' he thought and decided not to wake her up, instead, he went to the side of the bed and took out the Demon Transformation Sutra from underneath.

With the book in his hands, he went back and sat on a chair near the table, then took the books he collected from the library out of the cloth packets.

He wanted to understand a bit more about Cultivation before he truly began cultivating.

He knew that if he really started cultivating, getting a Lust Spark would only be a start. Then, there should be the 3 Awakenings.

And after that, the Evolution.

But he knew that there were many people who couldn't achieve the 'Evolution' and had their Sparks go defective. Leading to an end in their path of cultivation.

His mother was a prime example of this.

After failing, she had lost all the strength she accumulated on her three Awakenings and became a Mortal. Even though most people had a spark unlike him, the world was filled with these people who failed even while having the spark.

The people who lost their power.

All the traders were people like that.

All the people in the outer circle of Starlight Zone were people like that.

And he didn't want to be one of them after getting a second chance. He wanted to be one of the inner circle.

Taking a book called 'having a good foundation', he began reading.

How big of a spark was it good to have before second awakening?

How to go about the pain of Awakening?

Things to take note of.

After reading the random books for a while, he read more on his own cultivation technique, he didn't read much into the higher levels since that was generally considered as a bad habit that should be avoided since a practitioner's mind will grow narrow if he knew a cultivation techniques end goal and path.

And he was not a veteran to make changes either, so reading higher levels was only harmful. So he remained focused on what he had to do.

But as he read, one part, a tip from the Sacred Demon himself, came to his attention and it immediately made him frown, "If you believe that you have to take responsibility for all the women that you have sex with, this sutra is not for you. You can never achieve the apex of lust that way. That stage is only achievable by true Demons.

You have to lose yourself to lust and let it guide your actions before you guide it."

Reading that, Han Li felt disgruntled, but he shook his head and thought inside, 'Even you said you didn't reach the apex, how can you know what truly is considered apex?'

The world-feared lust demon would have been speechless if he saw a random trash say that to him.

But it was like that some times, people believe what they want, not what they need.

He read for a while, and just as he was starting to read another part, an aroma of cooked Banana fries pierced his nose. He blinked and closed the book, taking the Demon Scripture in his hands. He moved towards the kitchen.

His Mother was awake and cooking, and on the side, there was a plate filled with Banana fries. "What are you cooking?"

"Some rice and cold fish," Yue Li said, focused on her cooking.

Han Li took a tall wooden chair from the side and brought it near her, then lifted her up from the back and made her sit on it; she was barely 1.65 m tall, whereas he was 1.75 tall. So it was easy to carry her up.

"Hadn't I told you to only cook while seated?" Han Li scolded.

"But I don't like cooking while seated..." Yue Li pouted and stirred the mud pot with a laddle.

Her legs had some issues since her failure to evolve and her Spark's defect. So if she stood for long, her legs starts to hurt and it even becomes extremely painful at times.

Only Han Li knew how hard it was to treat that pain, since he couldn't even massage her since even touching was too painful.

"Does it hurt now?" he asked, the pain had been silent for the past few weeks, but he was unsure when it will hit her again.

"No, it doesn't hurt okay? Now go eat that!" Yue Li said with irritation and pointed at the Banana fries.

Taking the plate full of snack in his hand, he spoke, "Why are you so irritated? I am just saying it for your own good. Don't ask me to fetch cold water when it hurts."

Yue Li continued her cooking and acted as if she didn't hear, but then, suddenly asked, "If you wanted to learn the basics of cultivation, you could have just asked me... why take all these book? Don't you have to pay for it?"

"Ah, no, I cooked for the old man there in the past, and he likes my cooking a lot, so it was free. As long as I return it today itself."

Yue Li nodded and looked at her cooking.

The preparations ready, she put a lid on the pot and said, "Now wait for—"

Han Li interrupted and said, "Wait for another incense worth of time,"

They both said, "And the dish of the day is ready."

They couldn't help but chuckle.

Then, Yue Li faced him and asked, serious. "So, Xiao Han, what did you decide about getting a Wife?"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 5 - 5: Young Lord of the Ravens
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Inside an ancient cave, in a dark and wide tunnel, the echoing sound of water calmly dripping continued for a while before it was broken by a resounding SLAP!

Kevin Raven looked at the blade in his hand and got even angrier, such precious stuff! SUCH great stuff was sold for a mere 300 Sacred Coins?!

Gritting his teeth, he looked at the wan and wide-eyed merchant on the ground, squinted his eyes, and asked, "Do you at least remember who you sold that book to?"

"I do, I remember young master," The merchant replied, his mouth leaking blood and his head spinning, "I remember her, she was Yue Li! a middle-aged woman from the Starlight Zone, she is secretly famous for having disappeared in the past and coming back with a child years later. Black hair, beautiful white face, and short. You can find her easily!"

Kevin squinted his eyes further, thinking, 'The Starlight family?'

His family, the Raven clan was also one of the three great families of Southern Lust city but unlike the Starlight Family, his family's roots were very shallow.

Even though they were currently of equal power, Ravens were in the end not natively from Sacred Lust Continent and were foreigners whose ancestors settled in here after coming from another continent.

So they will be at a disadvantage!

But if it was a small unknown woman, he might be able to get the thing back. That book might as well be just as good as this mysterious black sword in his hands.

He still couldn't see how strong this sword was. What if that book contained some secret technique to use it better?

No matter what, he had to get it.

The Merchant, Shan Shan, could only moan in his head, 'Please god, Please god take this guy away!'

He had found a book and a blade in this cave while travelling and there was a childish writing on a boulder saying these things could make a fish become a dragon. He hadn't considered much of it then, after all, it was just a rusty black sword with no particular sharpness and a blank book.

Yet, after going to the starlight zone in this time's Awakening ceremony, he had counted his stars at giving the book away for a whole 300 coins.

But...

Who would have thought that he would meet this Young man on the way back and the man would immediately fall in love with the rusty sword?

If that was only it, he would have been happy, but Kevin even made him come here, where he had found the book and sword and even used the sword to cut a literal boulder in half!

This person was a strong Power cultivator. So Shan Shan couldn't even reject and could only tell every truth.

Silence lingered in the cave for a while and Kevin's black eyes sharpened, he said in a cold tone: "Tell me, what use is it to me if I let you live? I know that you have come to understand how important this book and sword might be, so you must also know how dangerous you are to me. So, tell me, why should I let you live?"

Kevin didn't want people on his back who would covet his treasures, it was best to cut the roots of trouble before it could happen.

Shan Shan's heart quivered and he said with fear, "Young Master, you can't enter the Starlight Zone but I can do that at every Awakening ceremony. I can go and buy it back for you!"

"Buy it back?" Kevin chuckled, taking out a small Gu worm from his side bag, "No, I will let you live but you have to get that woman you sold the book to and at the same time, also get the book. Eat this too," he said as he held his hands towards the man.

This was Death Worm cultivated by him for years, it came in pairs and if one of them was killed, the other would die too. It was a specialty of their Raven Clan.

If Shan Shan ate it, it will devour a part of his heart and replace it, and then, if Raven killed the other of the pair. It will also die, killing Shan Shan in the process.

Had the Sword not been such a great thing, Kevin would never have used his Gu Worm since it was even usable on cultivators. It could even help him enslave Evolution Stage power cultivators.

And Shan Shan, as a merchant, knew some of those details since this was one of the Raven Clan's most feared abilities. He shivered and looked at the slimy, grey worm slithering on top of the man's hands.

That slimy worm will live inside him from now on.

He took it into his hands with disgust. Kevin smiled and questioned, "When is the next ceremony again?"

"In..In two days."

"Okay, now Eat it."

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 6 - 6: Han Li's Decision
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

"So, Xiao Li, what did you decide about getting a Wife?"

Yue Li asked. It was going to be a new member of the house and even though she didn't show it, she was very nervous, and if he didn't take it seriously, that made her only worry more.

As of now, even though they were poor, they were happy and loved each other, but the addition of a new woman could change everything.

Even as a woman herself, she had to say, some women were far more poisonous than men.

In total of her 'being scammed career', the most she had been scammed was by Women.

Silent, Han Li pondered the question and considered his options once more, he really, really didn't want to get a wife. That was just too complicated.

But where else can he get a Virgin woman to copulate with? Of course, there was the brothel but still...

He sighed, Indeed, my morality will always be a barrier in the path.

"Oh...were you awake?" Han Li asked, not surprised at all. If he wasn't sure she was awake, he wouldn't have spoken out loud.

"You are so edgy today... do you know what my other world's people would call you?"

Surprised, Han Li asked, "What?"

"An edge lord."

Han Li turned silent. Was that something like the Lord of Blades or something?

Well, as long as it had an edge... It suits someone like him too, he guessed.

Mom kissed his chest and said, "Don't worry, I am just joking."

Han Li blinked, what...? He pinched her on her waist, and asked, his face slightly dark: "Tell me what that means!"

"Ouch! You scoundrel, how dare you pinch your mom!"

Then,

Lovely laughter echoed in the room...

Yue Li's bell-like tone mixed with Han Li's chuckle.

Indeed, his mom was the best.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 19 - 19: Overestimation
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

"Mom, you overestimate your System too much," Han Li suddenly said, his hands gently placed around her waist.

Breaking out of her still-sleepy thoughts, she asked, "What do you mean?"

She had always seen the system as a God that can achieve all her wishes as long as she paid a price. He had just come to know of the system, so why was he saying this all of a sudden?

Han Li sighed. "It literally says Luck-Trade, and that is what it is...Luck Trade, it is in a sense a universal shop with all kinds of magical resources of the world there that we could trade for with our fortune that appears in assets."

Yue Li was even more confused: "...But that doesn't make any sense though?"

Han Li smiled slightly, and asked, "Why?"

"I wished for a Home and everyone in the outer circle got one built for us, it is not a magical resource as you say, it is just a normal house."

"House Building Seed, a unique seed – a magical resource – that grows inside an artificial fruit, you requested for the house and the seed fell into the starlight clan's mud. Houses were about to grow in abundance, so the higher-ups decided to give everyone houses."

"Ah, no wonder all parts of the House are in wood and we had to add the other stuff in!" Yue Li muttered in disbelief.

"Yeah, it is an artificial product built by a cultivator of ancient times, it helps make good-looking wooden houses in huge numbers within just days, and you just have to add a thatched roof above, which the clan – generously so – did for us."

In this Era, the fruit that the seed grew on was extremely rare, so rare, it was a wonder how one of the seeds ended up growing here.

Han Li then spoke about the next part of her wish, "That wish of yours also included having a son by your side, and you ate another fruit to achieve that, a Life fruit. If a man ate it, even he will become pregnant, and you ate a Yang variant that assures a son instead of a daughter."

Yue Li almost couldn't believe it.

Both were indeed magical resources if what he said was true! But she suddenly had a doubt. "But then how did I get you a Cultivation Technique with the system? It is not a Magical Resource right?"

Magical Resources were fruits, trees, and such things that have unique magical properties, how can a technique be a Magical Resource?

Han Li chuckled.

"You asked the wish, 'I want my son to get back the ability to cultivate' and not for the Demonic Sutra itself, if you had asked for it specifically, we would have gotten nothing."

"...I am so confused..."

"Your wish was fulfilled, Mom, but not with the Cultivation Technique, but with a Magical Resource as usual," he paused for a breath and continued, "one of the Seven Sacred Eyes. You traded your 'Sacred level Body Cultivation Talent' for my Red Eyes which is considered one of this world's best resources."

"Your eye?"

"Yes, you got my eye in exchange for your Soul Cultivation Talent and according to the way the Demonic Lust Sutra is set up by the sacred demon, it will automatically reach the host of this special eye you got me by whatever fate."

It was lucky that he got the technique to cultivate, or he would never have known the long Sutra to acquire a Lust Spark in his body. He would have had the ability to cultivate because of the eye, but wouldn't have been able to since summoning the Lust spark into him required the first chant.

Yue Li gulped, so she traded her talent for a high-level eye treasure of sorts? and it ended up giving him the ability to cultivate?

Han Li then said, "But that is such a bad way to use the System, you are just hoping for the best, and there are many ways it could have gone wrong and...anyway! It is a totally dumb way of using it, you could have even gotten my cultivation talent to start working without sacrificing your incredible talent if you did it in a good way!"

All of this was too complicated for Yue Li's simple brain, so she just asked, "How do you know all that?"

Han Li smiled. "Your son is smart and you are dumb, that is just it."

Yue Li's face darkened slightly at the tease on her intelligence and she asked, "Simplify it for me then."

"In simple words, my dumb mom who I just happened to love so much can only trade things in the Asset tab for magical resources of equal value. And even then, there is a small catch."

"I see...what is the catch?" Yue Li asked.

She understood most of what he said too.

'So I had been thinking of the System as a god that can make all my wishes come true, but I was just trading with resources that could help achieve my wishes...'

She gave up her great cultivation talent for peanuts worth of things, but for some reason, that made her more relieved than sad, it felt as if a burden was released from her back.

"The catch..." Han Li sighed, "The catch is that you can only ask for the same type of thing you give."

"...Explain," Yue Li asked, embarrassed.

"You gave away your 'Body Cultivation Talent at Sacred Level', the ultimate representation of Life, for a Life Fruit and a House Builder Seed, which are both resources of Life Type."

There were 8 Types of resources and Life was one of those Types. So, if she traded away a Life type something, she can only buy a Life type something of equal value.

"Then you traded away your 'Sacred level Soul Cultivation Talent' to buy me another Life Type resource of equal value, which was the Eye."

Yue Li's head almost steamed due to all the thinking, but she asked, "So in the end, if I trade One type of thing, I get the same type of thing in return?"

"Exactly! In the current situation of our assets; if we trade away our house, it won't get us anything anymore as it is just considered as normal wood now, it can at maximum buy us a nice smelling incense Magical resource. It doesn't count for much of an asset."

The system didn't mind how the wood was perfectly arranged in a shape that allowed humans to live inside comfortably — as a home. To the system, the house was just wood. It was a wonder it even showed on the Asset tab.

"But if we had the House Building Seed's true thing itself, we could have exchanged it for something really good among the list of Life type Magical Resources, for example, Lifespan Increasing Dew which can increase the lifespan of a mortal with a year for every drop they drink."

That would have been so helpful... It could even heal people from the brink of death if he had it.

The house builder seed was traded with this world's best Cultivation Talent, so it must be very valuable too. He could have gotten a hefty amount of the dew.

Yue Li nodded in slight disbelief; having figured some of the things he told out.

All the while, her mind kept ringing with one question though, where did he suddenly learn all this?

She wasn't so dumb to miss that!

Han Li saw the silent question in her eyes and said. "I just had a dream in which I came to know all this."

She looked at his serious face, there was no way she would believe him...

Han Li chuckled. "I would love to tell you, but not now, okay? I will tell you now if you really want to know, but you have to let me touch you there as much as I want."

"No way you little scoundrel." Yue Li harrumphed gently.

Anyway, he had always been much smarter than her... He should have just figured it out somehow and was probably trying to take advantage of the situation.

She won't fall for his tricks in this matter!

They were walking on dangerous edges earlier itself, and that was her limit.

Han Li smiled and fell into his thoughts, that system had a way to be used, and he was well prepared to do that.

What to trade to get what and how to reach his previous peak as quickly as possible... he had a good idea of what to do.

Even though his mom was the one who had the system, he will be the one to use it, and he will use it well.

"Then what about the Demonic Lust Sutra?" Yue Li suddenly asked: "It is also in the Asset Tab. Can we trade it for something good?"

And Sacred Coins too...

"That is just counted as information that the system will buy from us if we trade the sutra, we can get information in return... but that has a very big issue, you get to only ask one question no matter how good of an information you trade, and it is rather limited in depth too."

That was why Yue Li named it 'Luck-Chat' in the first place, she could give away some things to have a Lucky encounter or give information away to Chat with it.

It was quite a dumb name, but good enough.

She had just been too awed by the system.

If the information he could buy back included things like cultivation techniques or such, it would have been really good, but it couldn't. Sadly so.

It can only be useful in buying high-class knowledge. Others might not know how to make it truly useful, but he had future knowledge to use it perfectly.

"You really came to know about the system more than me in a day...did you really have a dream?"

"Even I don't know much about that thing, it is just too complicated to feel around its working..."

"It is already noon... don't you have to cook anywhere today?" Yue Li suddenly asked as she saw the kight outside through the curtains.

"I don't, but I have some other business...we have to wake up."

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 20 - 20: Time to change destiny!
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Amidst the bustling crowd of people going in and out, Han Li strolled through the city gateway towards the forest.

Even though this gateway was mainly used by merchants who live or have stalls in the main city, it still had some ordinary people using it, but it was rather empty when an Awakening ceremony was not being hosted in one of the three clans.

It was not used as much as the other Gateways.

Only on Awakening ceremonies do outsiders come into the city to sell their goods

Furtively looking around and not finding Shan Shan among the mix of merchants around, Han Li calmly walked across and the guard let him pass without a question.

The guard was merely here to keep the crowd at bay in case of trouble after all, and not to catch shady activities. Nevertheless, he was a cultivator who had already gone through his Evolution.

Walking further, and soon hidden by the shadows of the thick trees and foliage, Han Li glanced towards a direction and sprinted.

He was quite sure the low-level cultivator of the Raven Clan won't be snooping around here, but this was still quite a gamble, if by any chance the guy was there, he would have had to run back with his tails tucked to the city.

Nobody would dare to hurt him inside the city unless they wanted war or something.

But still, this was a calculated gamble since even if the Raven was here, he won't just directly attack and would wait for Han Li to go further from the city walls and gateway.

He would never expect that Han Li was wary of him since Han Li of today was supposed to have no idea of a potential attacker.

After a while of walking around, surrounded by trees, Han Li kept searching for a specific one.

A tree with blue moss and yellow mushrooms on it.

'Green moss, no, this isn't the one.'

'This one has blue moss but not the mushrooms.'

He counted past the trees one by one and even though he couldn't find it yet, he was sure it was somewhere around this part of the forest.

One tree after another got a no and he kept on searching. There were many trees with one of the qualities but not both.

The sun of noon shined brighter and brighter, and the lands turned hotter in turn, but inside the shadows of this melancholic and calm forest, a young boy kept walking here and there.

Luckily for him, this place had no beasts; only some harmless things like birds and squirrels.

'Blue moss and Yellow Mushroom, Blue Moss and yellow mushroom!' he muttered inside his mind as he roamed.

He had almost searched the whole plot around here with more than 70 trees by now, and even climbed atop some of the trees, but couldn't find a thing.

In his previous life, Uncle Li, the fat Pang Li was traveling these woods and had seen a tree with blue moss and yellow mushrooms; while stopping there to look at it, he had found a small treasure trove in the process.

And that only happened months from now. And at that point, Han Li had already killed the Raven Clan cultivator covertly.

It was just a small sack filled with 5000 Sacred coins, but for the current him, it would have been very useful; he could have immediately had his first Awakening with it if he used that money and followed the Demonic Lust Sutra.

And he could have a much better start than his previous life.

"What a shame..." Han Li sighed, but his red eyes didn't lose their shine, "Guess I will have to go pickpocket in the market now."

He was quite good at that.

Then there was that other little treasure trove in one of the old aunties' bathrooms that someone left behind before death.

It must not have been found yet, so if he went there now, it could be his.

That was a bit troublesome though and it only had about 1000 coins, which was not a big amount of money in comparison to 5000 here.

Without hesitating, Han Li quickly turned around and began to leave, but just before he left, a thought crossed his mind, "He said the mushrooms AND blue moss! but the mushrooms can't grow in this cold season!"

He could still remember him bragging about it, but he had been a bit tunnel-visioned.

Feeling quite dumb, Han Li quickly went to one of those trees with only blue moss that he had avoided and immediately began digging the mud around its roots.

Uncle Li had his fat and heavy body to make the mud move accidentally once he stepped on it, but he didn't, so he dug into the mud using his bare hands and soon, he could feel the sensation of a cloth on his hands.

With his full power, Han Li pulled it out of the heavy mud.

There it was, a muddy and brown small sack. A bit eager, Han Li licked his lips and opened it. a sack full of golden pearls — Sacred Coins.

Han Li calmly covered it and put it on his back before heading back to the city.

The first step was done, now it was the time to start cultivating the Demonic Lust Sutra for real.

Yes,

It was due time he went through his first Awakening.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 21 - 21: Using the Luck-Trade System
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Han Li gently dropped the small sack filled with coins on the ground.

Yue Li looked at it in intrigue and asked, curious, "What is that Xia Li?"

Han Li didn't answer and went behind her and wrapped his hands around her waist.

"Open the System, Mom."

"...Sure, but why?"

"Open it already..."

Yue Li pouted and opened it, and Han Li didn't waste time and took her hands into his, then used it to click "Luck-Trade".

Yue Li instinctively looked down at the "Asset Tab" and her eyes widened in surprise.

"Fiv..Five thousand?!" She exclaimed out loud.

Han Li grinned seeing the adorable expression. And said, his red eyes locked back on the System.

"Don't worry Mom, It is completely safe money."

"But..But Li, di..did you steal?!"

Somewhat pissed, Han Li shook his head, "Don't worry so much, you dumbass, and trade what I tell you to do."

"Xiao Li..."

Sigh... Han Li sighed at her frown and said, irritated, "It is something I got due to luck, okay? It was buried on the ground and I just got it."

"Xiao Li..."

"Okay, it was something I borrowed from someone and I will have to give it back, okay?" He asked, more irritated.

Yue Li sighed in relief, and said with a confident smile, "I know my son won't steal, I was just nervous seeing all the money."

"Now trade what I say."

Yue Li smiled nervously and clicked on empty air that looked like a golden screen to them. "What do you want to wish for?"

"An energy extraction pearl."

"A w–"

"Wish for it Mom."

Yue Li didn't think much about it and closed her eyes with irritation and then began to mutter in her heart, "I wish I get an Energy extraction pearl"

The golden screen shifted and showed another Tab:

[Assets you can exchange for an Energy Extraction Pearl: 3400 Sacred coins out of the 5220 coins. Accept Trade? Y/N]

Han Li smiled, indeed, both of these things were of Energy Nature.

Sacred coins could be used for cultivation after going through Evolution after all.

"That much money! Is it really any useful? Xiao Li... It will be a lot of hard work to pay it back...you know?"

"Stop whining and buy it." He rubbed his cheeks against hers.

Yue Li puffed her cheeks and clicked 'Yes'.

3400 coins vanished out of the sack on the ground. Han Li could see it visibly shrinking.

Licking his lips, Han Li waited without letting his mother go out of his embrace. Yue Li also waited nervously.

Knock* Knock*

A sound came from outside, someone was knocking on their door.

Han Li smiled and whispered, "Do you think it's here?"

Yue Li nodded.

Both of them stopped playing around and Han Li tentatively went and opened the door, and to his surprise, the person looking at him was someone he knew – it was  Shan Liyue, Fat Uncle Li's daughter.

The one who was supposed to have a marriage the next day.

Han Li's eyes automatically moved to scan her looks. She was a young woman with a tanned and quite beautiful face, and she was wearing humble white village clothes and her eyes were the signature black of most Starlight Clan members.

Moreover, her boobs were aplenty and her butt was quite a sight.

The old Han Li would have thought her to be just above average, but the Great Demon could see that she had yet to have her full blossom and would be a great beauty.

Not at all understanding that a pervert had scanned her all over and instantly decided she was his woman from now, Shan Liyue smiled at Yue Li and said, "Hello Aunty Yue, and hello...hmm... Han Li!"

Han Li and Yue Li glanced at her in intrigue, and she looked back at them.

'Why are they glancing at me like that?' Liyue felt odd at their intrigued gazes and decided to immediately finish her job and go back.

"I was here to give some balance that my father forgot to give you, he wanted to give it to you in the morning but said he couldn't find you."

"Ah, that!" Han Li rose an eyebrow. Indeed, something like that happened.

"Yes, this is the 30 coins he asked me to give," Liyue calmly placed a small pouch on Yue Li's hands and looked at Han Li.

"And also, my father asked me to tell you to meet him tomorrow, I think you might get some work if you do."

Han Li smiled at her and said, "Don't worry, I will speak with him."

Surprised, Liyue looked at his face, it was only now that she suddenly saw his gleaming red eyes. 'Was it always red like that? It is so beautiful...'

Chuckling, Han Li asked, "You like those eyes?"

"...I do," Absentmindedly replying, Liyue's face immediately reddened.

"I..I mean, it is a beautiful color."

Han Li moved closer to her and looked straight into her black shiny eyes and asked, "Yours is also quite beautiful, you know?"

Feeling her heart skip a beat, Liyue shifted her gaze, she felt quite uncomfortable.

Seeing that, Han Li licked his lips and extended his hands towards her face.

'Wh...what is he about to do?' she exclaimed in her mind and was about to move back when Han Li gently took out something stuck in her hair.

"Sorry, our place has many birds that drop these things on your head."

Startled, she put her hands on the place where he took it from and asked in curiosity, "What is that?"

"It is nothing but a small stone." Han Li smiled and showed her what was in his hands, and indeed, it was a useless stone.

Feeling slightly ashamed, she cupped her fists and quickly left. Han Li glanced at her as she ran away.

"Cute girl right, Mom?"

Yue Li looked at him in amazement and nodded. Even an amateur like her could tell that he was teasing the poor girl.

And for some reason, she really liked what she saw. Maybe it was because she found something new about her son that she hadn't yet.

He was good at teasing other girls too.

Han Li chuckled at her and showed her the stone. "Do you know what this is Mom?"

Yue Li looked at it, it just looked like plain stone. "Is it the Energy extraction pearl thingy?"

"Yes, It is the cure for your legs."

Yue Li's eyes widened in surprise.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 22 - 22: Energy Extraction Pearl
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

In Han Li's oldest to freshest memories, Yue Li was with him.

She was his perfect mother.

When he was too young to work, she worked hard to feed them. Han Li might seem to be the one doing all the work now.

But that was it — Now.

Some years ago, she had worked in the fields, knitted others' clothes, and even worked shortly on a stall to earn a living for them.

It was when Han Li turned eighteen that he got the Demonic Lust Sutra and the ability to cultivate.

But Yue Li had traded her Soul Cultivation Talent at the time when Han Li was just ten.

She herself was 27 at that point, quite a normal age to go through an evolution attempt.

With her extremely high talent, it was only natural she could not grow stronger easily without guidance.

High talent without knowledge of how to use it was just a hindrance in the early stages of cultivation.

But unlike other times, her "Luck-chat System" had not worked immediately after the trade – or so she had thought – and her son didn't get the ability to cultivate.

She lost her talent, but he didn't get any talent.

Only a special Eye had settled onto Han Li's soul covertly. That was what she traded for, but she never knew that.

To her, Han Li was just like any other day, he never got a spark.

So, in the end, she inevitably failed in her evolution when she was 33, and when Han Li was 16.

And the horrendous cycle of leg pain started to assault her, and Han Li, even though young, didn't allow his mom to work anymore.

He started working and found out cooking was a good way to earn decent money, he just had to copy his mother's cooking and it was easy.

All the while, she went on to be scammed multiple times in search of a lucky encounter that would one day make Han Li be able to cultivate.

She just thought the System was late.

And while they spend their life in monochromy like that, the mysterious magic set up on the Demonic Lust Sutra that made it automatically find a Sacred Eye user had been triggered and it slowly moved towards them.

It reached him on his 18th birthday.

All these thoughts briefly flashed through Han Li's mind as he looked at the stone in his hands; The Energy Extraction Pearl.

That was why he said it was not the way to use the System. Asking something vaguely like, 'Oh please give him that talent or this capability' would only end up in duds or useless trades.

Whenever you wanted something from the system, it was best to have an in-depth knowledge of what you wanted.

Yue Li waved a hand infront of his face and woke him up from his daze. And asked cutely, "Where are you Xiao Li?"

Han Li looked at her, they were now inside their home and were talking about healing her when he suddenly thought of all of that.

"I love you, Mom." He focused on her eyes and said out of nowhere.

Yue Li looked at him weirdly, 'Where did that come from?'

Irritated, Han Li playfully twisted her ears from the side and said, "Just say you love me too when I say that, you dumb woman!"

"Ouch, it hurts, it hurts!" Yue Li's face cringed in mock pain and Han Li stopped.

She looked back at him in irritation and said, "You have been pinching me too much these days."

"Okay, then, I won't pinch you." Han Li kept the smile and moved infront of her.

Their bodies mere inches apart, Yue Li looked up at his face in question.

Han Li wrapped his hands around her waist and bent down slightly, then slowly brought his face closer to hers.

She flinched slightly and Han Li's lips gently caught her lips, and before she could even think, her son was deeply kissing her.

Both of them naturally closed their eyes and enjoyed their first kiss. The taste of each other.

Feeling her grow out of breath, Han Li gently took his tongue out of her mouth and bit her lips gently before moving his face back.

Yue Li breathed heavily and clung to his chest for support.

And Han Li just looked at her red face in amusement and said, "I would do that instead of pinching you from now on when I feel you are too irritating."

Yue Li could feel her heart beating like a drum, she said weakly, "Th...that was out of nowhere."

Han Li smiled, the custom of kisses were new to him, but it was not a new concept to her when they came to know about it some years from now.

But it felt nice to have his mother's first kiss again.

"You like it, mom?" He didn't let her go out of his embrace and just kept looking into her eyes.

Yue Li pondered the question seriously and then asked, "You kind of taste like blackberries, did you eat some?"

Han Li looked at her irritatedly for a second and went for another kiss.

And this time, Yue Li's legs rose from the ground a bit to support the kiss.

Han Li couldn't help but find her more irritating.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 23 - 23: Recovery
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Yue Li followed Han Li's hand with her gaze as it effortlessly drew something complex on the ground using chalk.

She could see he was drawing a pattern, but she couldn't quite figure out what he was planning.

After their lovely first kiss, he suddenly asked her for a chalk and she had given him what she had.

But he didn't tell her why, he had just started drawing on their room's wooden floor.

So she scrutinized him.

He was so focused on drawing it, why?

Why does he seem more mature all of a sudden in these past few days?

Was it really because she let him do that?

She was deep in thoughts about the great dao when Han Li suddenly snapped her out of her thoughts.

He wiped some sweat away from his forehead and said, "Mom, it is ready, come here."

Yue Li asked curiously, "What is this drawing?"

And why did the drawing seem to be dimly shining?

"Drawing?" Han Li took her by the hand and placed it on the 'Dead's Return Diagram' and muttered: "Only ignorant people like you would dare to call this thing a drawing."

Feeling the slight coldness on her hand, she questioned, "What is it then? some kind of formation or array or something?"

It seems he had something prepared when he said he could heal her.

"It is a masterpiece, created by none other than one of the seven sacred demons."

"One of those people again?" Yue Li couldn't help but exclaim. She had heard of them so much after coming to this world; they were like the gods of her past life and everyone was like their believers.

But she could understand though, they must be hella strong, actually like Gods or something.

"Yeah, one of those seven mighty demons."

"Which one?"

"Who cares about that, just know that this thing is good."

Yue Li then confusedly asked, "Where did you get it then?"

Han Li said without giving her a chance to speak, "Eat the pearl I gave you."

Yue Li took the stone he gave her earlier, 'Why does he call it a pearl?'

"Eat it."

She opened her mouth and ate it.

Han Li put a hand above her hand and muttered meaningless jibberish for a while before concluding it with, "...I, the inheritor of Ancient Lust and the wielder of one of the seven Sacred Eyes ask for the unknown dimension to open for a split second."

Yue Li looked at his quirky actions weirdly and waited.

"Mom, just wait, the rest is up to luck... even the system can't help us here."

Yue Li nodded weirdly.

'Well...'

Yue Li waited patiently, she had no lack of patience.

While, Han Li moved some distance away from her and silently hoped for good luck.

This Diagram was something that he had adventured with his life to get in the last parts of his past life.

It was a fight that cemented his name as the Era's Greatest Demon — Red-Eyed Han Li.

It was a Sacred Level object in worth, but he would never put it out in the open other than in his head and now.

It was too dangerous if the world knew all the treasures he had.

Moreover, the chance was only a split second long, so it was practically up to luck, even the system won't be able to affect nature in such ways.

He was sure about that.

...

Yue Li's hands started to turn colder and colder.

But she could feel the coldness being constantly absorbed by her belly.

Even someone as dumb as her could guess it was due to the stone she swallowed.

Suddenly, the world around her changed to something utterly red for a brief second before it returned to calmness.

And the coldness had vanished!

Even the diagram had vanished from below her hands.

"Wha..What is going on?" She exclaimed.

"Check the system for your talent, does your cultivation talent show something?" Han Li asked as he came closer.

Yue Li turned on her golden-colored system and looked at it.

[Body Cultivation Talent: Average.]

[Soul Cultivation Talent: Average.]

Han Li relievedly smiled but his red eyes then shined deeply.

He said with a stern tone, "Mom, immediately go through your three Awakenings one by one."

Yue Li was a bit overwhelmed at the moment and didn't question him, she immediately focused.

As long as someone's Spark was as strong as an average 13-year-old's, they could go through the first Awakening.

She tried to focus on her Spark and immediately, a Dark Blue spark came to her senses.

'Dark Blue? wasn't Starlight Spark white?'

It was a finger length wide, just as wide as Han Li's current Lust Spark.

Both of them were of Average talent for their Cultivation Stage.

She focused on it intensely and the Spark tried to come out of her body.

It was as if it was hidden behind invisible barriers and she could potently feel them at the moment, and right after it came out of the first barrier.

Her senses grew clear.

The sound of distant chattering outside, the sound of insects, the sound of birds.

Everything was so clear, she felt as if she was reborn.

"Don't stop Mom, go through the rest!" Han Li said with a monstrous grin and a terrorizing voice.

Yue Li heeded even though the euphoria of suddenly enhanced senses hadn't vanished.

She once again focused on her Spark and it automatically tried to come out of her body.

Another invisible barrier was crossed.

And her senses again grew clearer. She could now understand what the chatter outside was.

"I heard the best position for sex is being under a man!"

"That's true, but you are a man, don't you feel disgusted?"

"Aren't you a man too my dear?"

...

Han Li saw her weird expression and said, guessing, "Such things are normal, people would gossip about everything, don't mind them and just focus on your Awakening."

Yue Li rolled her eyes at him but did what he told.

Han Li looked at her in intrigue, what spark did she get in the end?

Her Spark passed the third and final barrier and she held her palm infront.

A dark blue fire the size of a baby's fist lit up above her hand.

Her third Awakening had succeeded.

Han Li looked at it closely.

Liyue could feel her heart beating slightly harder. She nodded with a bit of hesitation. Maybe, this was the only chance she might get to speak straight with her soon-to-be Husband. She wanted to tell him what was on her mind. She would have at least tried.

"Wasn't it...because of my Father's money?" Liyue asked. Most people didn't know, but some people did. Her father was quite rich for an Outer Circle citizen of Starlight Zone.

Han Li shook his head. "Who wants your father's petty money?"

She was confused. "Then why?" She asked. As far as she knew, she didn't even look that beautiful. There were many more beautiful women who would marry Han Li if he was as talented as her father boasted.

Why would he bother going theough all the trouble for her if not for the money? Wasn't she totally worthless without it?

"Many reasons actually, but the first of which is..." He looked at her whole body. "You are a gorgeous woman, Liyue."

Even though not the best beauty, she looked pretty without any makeup. She had a natural charm. And with his experienced eyes, he could tell she would be an absolutely stunning woman after she was more mature.

Liyue felt her heart skip a beat. No matter how she considered herself average, to hear those words from a man in a situation like this felt....good.

"And of course, if I wanted to get a woman for her looks, there are sluts all around in the city. I know Pang Li's... Hmm, now he is my father-in-law, so I should show some respect. Anyway, I know your family's situation."

Liyue silently looked at him.

"The fact that you looked after your sick mother for a major part of your life is commendable. I don't see any reason for you to find yourself lesser after doing something like that. In fact, I almost see you as the perfect choice at the moment."

Liyue looked at him with wide eyes. She hadn't really told him what she was feeling but he still told her the answer to an unasked question.

Why was it that someone — someone even better than the bride who abandoned her without a thought — came looking for her?

He liked my... character? I was... Gorgeous?

Nobody had ever told something like that to her except her mother. Is he just saying those to fool me?

"Be proud of yourself. And If you feel your opinions lack the proper voice, from now on, yell with my name. Your husband's name. So, if you still wish to be my woman, here is the hand, will you take it?" Han Li gave her a hand. "If you want, you can go home and stay unmarried. I will talk to Pang Li for you."

Liyue could feel her heart thumping. It felt so surreal. Did there really exist a man who cared for her opinion instead of anything else?

Yue Li came from the side and gently took her hands. Then said with a determined face: "Don't worry, my son is a bastard but I won't let him treat you badly. Just take the hand."

Liyue looked at her and her heart suddenly filled with hope. If this was the kind of woman who raised him... Wouldn't he be the best husband?

She dropped her unconscious guard and a small hand fell into Han Li's firm hand. He held it with care.

"Now, we are a family..." Yue Li muttered. Surprisingly, she was quite eager to learn more about this new daughter-in-law. She felt like a perfect friend for her.

'I guess he also chose someone similar to me for me...' She thought with a smile.

Liyue on the other hand was confused but in her mind, she could feel a slight flicker of unknown emotions bubbling. The feeling of a strong hand in her hand. The sense of strength that came with it.

The smiling Yue Li on the side who seemed like the perfect Mother.

'Is this what an actual loving family is like?' she couldn't help but wonder. She had never felt that feeling before. The feeling of wanting to belong somewhere.

Han Li looked at his bubbly mother and nodded inwardly. They were still at the start and it would take a bit of time for Liyue to come out of her shell. But overall, she was a good choice.

He tightly held her hands. Yue Li smiled, "What about I cook something up? I have a new recipe I never tried. Want to eat, daughter-in-law?"

Liyue nodded and an unconscious smile slowly formed on her face. Han Li and Yue Li raised an eyebrow immediately.

"You should smile more, that looks more beautiful that way." Yue Li exclaimed and Han Li nodded.

"She does indeed look beautiful with a smile," he said, patting Liyue's cheeks.

Her heart skipped a beat and she said in a low voice. "Maybe you should speak less sweet words like that..."

Han Li wrapped his hands around her waist. "I will try but 'our' Mom tells me to make you happy. How can I ignore her?"

Yue Li unwrapped his hands from the back and took Liyue away. "That's enough! Now it's time we ladies have our alone time to speak. She will be helping me cook! You get lost now!"

Han Li chuckled. Asking, "Do you know how to cook?"

Liyue nodded immediately. "I am the one who cooks in the house."

"Okay..." Han Li let them go. "The food better be the best thing I ever ate Mom, and be extravagant in spending."

Yue Li nodded and left proudly with her new friend.

After they left the room, Han Li turned his gaze to the window nearby with an irritated face.

"Fatty, you have been snooping around for quite a while there," he said irritably: "Come out!"

A round head poked up from the bushes and looked in through the glass. Then smiled widely.

"This fatso..." Speechless, Han Li had the urge to beat him up.

...

In the kitchen.

The place was lit up by oil lamps and Yue Li had already put a pot above the fire with some ingredients to get cooking.

"Xiao Li also studied cooking from me," Yue Li spoke with a smile, "He used to be such a cute little thing... He once even tried putting his hand into the fire."

Liyue listened while giving Yue Li the ingredients and cutting them. "I heard he is good at cooking... My father says he is the best chef in the outer circle of our Starlight Zone."

Yue Li proudly nodded. "He learned from me after all."

Liyue awkwardly nodded. But truly, she was far less nervous after coming out of the room. Yue Li was much easier to speak with than Han Li.

"Uhm..." She suddenly spoke but didn't know what to call her anymore.

"You should call me Mother or Mom from now on, that's what Xiao Li calls me."

"But we aren't yet married..."

"Hmm...It's the same thing, we both like you already, and that is enough. That mentioned, do you want to know something?" Yue Li looked around as she asked.

"...Yes?"

"Xiao Li told me yesterday that he might just accept you as his wife and not have an official marriage since it is too troublesome. But after we saw you there, I am sure he would accept to have an official marriage. He seems to really accept you."

Liyue became silent. She also liked Han Li as far as she saw but more than that. She liked this family.

"Well, let's cook the rest, Sadly we don't have a refrigerator but it's fine. Xiao Li also likes veggies."

"... Refrigerator?"

Yue Li turned silent. Uh, Xiao Li would get mad if I revealed such secrets. He warned her earlier not to reveal any.

"That's a mythical weapon said to Freeze water."

"Such things exist?"

"Maybe?"

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 36 - 36: Man to Man talk.
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

While Yue Li and Liyue were busy cooking food and decorating tables. Han Li and his fat Father-in-law walked the roads in Starlight Zone silently, and soon, they were in a small seating area usually used by the kids around.

It was already night-time, so nobody was there. But due to having Awakened, Han Li's senses were much better and he had clear vision of his surroundings. Even though the moonlight was bright enough to let him see even if his senses were normal.

Sitting on one of the seat-like rocks, Han Li waited for the fat man to sit. And then said, "Never stalk outside my house again. For whatever reason it might have been."

Pang Li awkwardly nodded. He just wanted to make sure his daughter wasn't going to go somewhere else instead of going to Han Li's. What if she ran away or something? Even though he knew she wasn't the type to daringly do something like that.

"So...Brat..." Pang Li hesitated, he didn't know why, but after Han Li's eyes turned red. Calling him that felt wrong. "Anyway, what do you think about Liyue?"

Han Li looked at him and chuckled slightly. "You really are what they call a horrible parent. Well, she is a good girl. Just lacks some confidence in herself."

"...So about the marriage?" The Fatty asked. Obviously more interested in business than family. Han Li was a solid asset that he was investing in. He canceled the marriage with another talented person for him after all.

Both only had equal chances at reaching Evolution in his opinion. But he had still chosen to cancel the first one for him. He sure expected high returns.

Nodding, Han Li assured. "I don't plan to give her to anyone else. My mom also seems to have liked her."

"Then what about the marriage ceremony? We can have it anytime you want since everything is ready."

"Hmm... Let me speak about that with Liyue today. Anyway, even if she does want a marriage, it will only be after the Awakening ceremony." Han Li was sure about that.

The place turned silent for a moment and a cold night breeze passed by.

Han Li suddenly asked, "I know her mother had a sickness...what was her name?"

"My wife?" Pang Li raised an eyebrow: "Her name is Li Yao."

Han Li nodded. In this life and his other lives, he had known Pang Li and had had many dealings with him. He had obviously heard of his wife.

She was said to be bedridden most of the year and her daughter Liyue was said to be an extremely filial girl who never slacked in her duties. That was one of the reasons he chose her.

"I never actually met her, right? What is her actual issue?"

Pang Li sighed. "The same issue as your mother. She failed in her Evolution and instead of the Soul Energy lingering on one part of the body, her whole body is spread with that energy. So unlike your mother who I heard had leg pain... Li Yao's whole body hurts and she cannot move after every time the pain hits."

Han Li turned silent. Everyone who failed in Evolution had some kind of constant suffering. After all, once they fail, their Spark vanishes. They become defects that has soul energy in their body.

But without a Spark, Soul Energy is an unusable fuel that just hurts. Even the Fat Pang Li was said to have constant pain in his tummy.

But of course, Han Li had many ways he could heal it that had yet to be spread around in Sacred Lust Continent. The current known ways that everyone knew were complex and expensive. But for him, there were many cheap ways.

But that would be a bit troublesome if it is known by others. He had plans to use that knowledge as a business but not at the moment when he was weak enough to be swatted to death.

But such Soul Energy was very useful if he could absorb it using his Lust Spark. It would quicken the process of his talent enhancement. He could also heal his mother-in-law in the process.

'I will be patient for now...'  There was no need to rush. The only thing remotely concerning was the Raven Clan cultivator but Han Li had his plans for him.

"Okay then Fatso, I will go back... They must be waiting for me with my food." Han Li said calmly and stood up, then swatted the dust away from his back.

With a wave of his hand, he walked back home.

There was no need for him to invite Pang Li for dinner. It was a moment for Liyue to bond with them, why would he ruin it by bringing the fatso with him?

Pang Li looked at his back as he moved away. 'If Han Li becomes an Evolution Stage, setting up a store in the inner circle of Starlight Zone won't be a dream anymore.'

He wasn't afraid of not getting anything and being abandoned by his daughter after marriage since Liyue loved her Mother. And by proxy, she would never leave him. He hadn't been a truly terrible parent as Han Li mentioned either.

His daughter was raised with the principles of returning kindness with kindness. Even if she were to abandon her father, she would pay him enough before she abandoned him. And obviously, she would also have a much better life.

He was a shrewd person, there was no way he would marry off his daughter without thinking all of that.

But he was not someone so cruel to not even think of his daughter's well-being. Han Li looked back at him from a distance and smiled, 'Quite impressive for a fatso.'

He was already more than 50 years old and with the issues of his Soul Energy and such, he would at most live for another decade or two. So, wanting to settle his daughter with a capable man was the best choice if thought logically.

If his daughter was lucky enough to not fail in Evolution, she could then choose to cancel the marriage and cut her ties with her husband. If she failed, there was a chance she would have an Evolved husband.

For an Evolved who usually lived for more than 200 years, one canceled marriage was nothing. In the end, the only things she will end up losing were things people only care about temporarily. Like virginity for example.

And if she does end up loving her husband, that was fine too. It was even better.

When the time came, she would have a better life even without Pang Li's guidance. And alongside, he as the father, would also receive his benefits. Making his decade or two among the living better. He will also have an inheritance to leave for his daughter after his death too.

All the while, Liyue thought herself to be a person who wasn't cared for by her father at all. She even hated him for many things.

Marrying Liyue off at this moment was the best choice. In Pang Li's opinion, she won't grow more beautiful with age anyway, so the best option was to marry her when she was at her prime.

Then whatever happened, it would be to her own advantage. She won't have to really suffer no matter what ended up being happening.

'But, don't worry. I am capable enough to look after my women by myself...'

Since he had decided Liyue to be his, there was no way he would let her fail in Evolution.
